$comment: FF-1..FF-8 fitness-gate map (OQ-2; guards BR-FF-1/2/3). Each FF names the Nx target(s) that enforce it. `active` FFs are CI-blocking: their backing targets must be defined AND invoked in the CI workflow, and their evidence fixtures/scripts must exist. `tracked` FFs are deferred (their AC-P-V dispatch fixtures do not exist yet): the backing target must be defined, but it is reported non-blocking with a `tracks` pointer until the fixtures land. FFDD (BR-FF-3): add or flip a row here, not code. Run via `@epa-wg/cem:fitness-gate-map`. See docs/fitness-functions.md.

gates.title: Negotiation determinism: same-MAJOR loads, unsupported MAJOR rejects, per axis
Isolation: no region interpreted by another content type's processor
Mode-disposition: unknown optional ignore/degrade/reject; must-understand rejects
gates.$note: Scoped to the BR-VC-9 / AC-P-6.7 run-mode disposition over unknown OPTIONAL features per governed contract (RunMode app/build-SSR/dev × presentation/data-security class → reject/degrade, BR-VC-8 must-understand override). Decision-core packages/cem-elements/src/lib/disposition.ts; applied at both data/security contract ingest seams — snapshot hydration (adoptServerRenderedInstance) + edge-render-state (readEdgeRenderStateContents) — with a configurable runMode (default application). The PARSER-side AC-P-V-6 unresolved-namespace disposition (a cem_ml region whose namespace resolves to no metadata/schema/rule) is separate cem_ml work tracked in docs/todo.md, not asserted by this gate.

gates.title: Removal gate: zero in-repo consumers of a deprecated form + external window
SemVer-presence: every governed contract declares a version axis
XSLT capability-gating: unsupported XSLT version rejects; region isolated + version-pinned
gates.tracks: AC-P-6.8 XSLT region dispatch not built — the engine has no xsl: handling and XSLT is absent from the Layer-5 handoff content types (handoff.rs SUPPORTED_CONTENT_TYPES); version-pinned XSLT dispatch + isolation + explicit opt-in ([B]-tier) must land before AC-P-V-4/V-7 fixtures can assert.
